steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject is “The city of Quito in Ecuador.” The core noun is “city” (singular). The phrase “of Quito in Ecuador” is a modifier describing location, not changing the subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: To apply subject-verb agreement here, we need a singular verb form. Is is the only singular option among the choices. The choices “have been,” “are,” and “are being” are all plural forms that violate this rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
